title: GitHub server with a PAT env key is REVIEW

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers-archived (src/github/README.md). Unmodified snippet; placeholders such as <YOUR_TOKEN> are upstream's own.

humanExpectation.rationale: A credential-shaped env key (a GitHub personal access token) is a real secret surface a reviewer must verify is sourced safely; the pinned docker image and -e env flag are not themselves dangerous.
knownLimitations: The detector keys on the credential-shaped name, not the placeholder value <YOUR_TOKEN>.
